card.title: Locale and currency
card.description: Pick the country where this business operates. Defaults flow from the global catalog; overrides apply only to this tenant.
card.uiNotReadyWarning: The operator UI does not yet ship a {{language}} bundle. Numbers and dates render correctly; text copy will fall back to Spanish.
card.overrideHint: Leave blank to inherit from the country defaults.

toast.saveSuccessDescription: All currency and date formatting now use the {{country}} defaults.
toast.saveErrorFallback: Unable to save the locale settings. Please try again.
